title: zanthoxylum rhodoxylon
intro: Zanthoxylum rhodoxylon, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a flowering plant native to China, characterized by its thorny branches and aromatic bark. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum rhodoxylon include reducing pain and fever, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
